>>> text/hp_pp_window/separate_decimal_digits.asm
  C20D3F:             SEPARATE_DECIMAL_DIGITS:
  C20D3F: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION
  C20D41:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C20D41:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C20D41:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int
  C20D41: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          F0 FF 5B 68 
  C20D49: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C20D4B: A2 68 89        LDX #.LOWORD(HPPP_WINDOW_DIGIT_BUFFER) + 2
  C20D4E:                 ; Get 1s digit
  C20D4E: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20D51: 22 31 92 C0     JSL MODULUS16
  C20D55: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D57: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C20D5A:                 ; Get 10s digit
  C20D5A: CA              DEX
  C20D5B: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20D5E: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D60: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C20D62: 22 5B 91 C0     JSL DIVISION16S_DIVISOR_POSITIVE
  C20D66: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C20D68: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20D6B: 22 31 92 C0     JSL MODULUS16
  C20D6F: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D71: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C20D74: CA              DEX
  C20D75:                 ; Get 100s digit
  C20D75: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20D78: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D7A: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C20D7C: 22 5B 91 C0     JSL DIVISION16S_DIVISOR_POSITIVE
  C20D80: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D82: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C20D85: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20D87: 2B 60           END_C_FUNCTION

>>> system/wait.asm
  C269BE:             ; Do nothing for some number of frames
  C269BE:             WAIT:
  C269BE: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION
  C269C0:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C269C0:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C269C0:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int frames
  C269C0: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          F0 FF 5B 68 
  C269C8: AA              TAX
  C269C9: 86 0E           STX @LOCAL00
  C269CB: 80 04           BRA @UNKNOWN1
  C269CD:             @UNKNOWN0:
  C269CD: 22 D5 2D C1     JSL WINDOW_TICK
  C269D1:             @UNKNOWN1:
  C269D1: A6 0E           LDX @LOCAL00
  C269D3: 8A              TXA
  C269D4: CA              DEX
  C269D5: 86 0E           STX @LOCAL00
